info.name: FROVO Vendor Management
info.description: Complete API collection for FROVO Vendor Management System. Organized into Company Management, Dashboards, Vendor CRUD, Vendor Verification, Document Management, and Audit Trail.

item.name: Company Management

request.description: Login as Super Admin. Auto-sets auth_token on success.
Login as Vendor Manager/Admin. Auto-sets auth_token on success.
Login as Vendor Staff. Auto-sets auth_token on success.
Retrieve a paginated list of all companies with optional filtering by status, registration type, legal entity structure, and search.
Retrieve a single company by its MongoDB ObjectId.
Delete a company by its MongoDB ObjectId.
Retrieve statistical overview of all companies.

item.description: Company CRUD operations, statistics, and status management.

item.name: Dashboards

request.description: Retrieve the company dashboard with paginated results and optional filtering.

item.description: Dashboard endpoints for company and brand overview data.

item.name: Vendor CRUD

request.description: Create a new brand with registration details, financial information, and document uploads. Uses form-data for file upload support.

formdata.description: Required for: pvt, opc, llp, public
Required for: pvt, opc, llp, proprietorship, partnership

request.description: Create a new brand with registration details, financial information, and document uploads. Uses form-data for file upload support.
Retrieve a paginated list of all brands with optional filtering by verification status, category, type, and company.
Retrieve a single brand by its MongoDB ObjectId.
Delete a brand by its MongoDB ObjectId.
Retrieve all brands belonging to a specific company by the company's MongoDB ObjectId.
Retrieve statistical overview of all brands.

item.description: Brand/Vendor CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete brands and retrieve brand statistics.

item.name: Vendor Verification

request.description: Update a company's verification status (pending/verified/rejected). Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { verification_status: 'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected', risk_notes: 'reason' }
Update the active/inactive status of a company. Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { company_status: 'active' | 'inactive', risk_notes: 'reason' }

Bulk update company verification status. Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { company_ids: [...], verification_status: 'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected', risk_notes: 'reason' }

Update a brand's verification status (pending/verified/rejected). Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { verification_status: 'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected', risk_notes: 'reason' }
Update a brand's active/inactive status. Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { brand_status: 'active' | 'inactive' }
Bulk update brand verification status. Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access this. Payload: { brand_ids: [...], verification_status: 'pending' | 'verified' | 'rejected', risk_notes: 'reason' }

item.description: Company and Brand verification & status management endpoints. Only super_admin and vendor_admin can access these. Two independent systems: verification_status (pending/verified/rejected) and active/inactive status.

item.name: Document Management

request.description: Export all companies data in the specified format (CSV by default).
Export a single company's data by its MongoDB ObjectId in the specified format.
Export all brands data in the specified format (CSV by default).
Export a single brand's data by its MongoDB ObjectId in the specified format.

item.description: Export and document management endpoints for companies and brands.

item.name: Audit Trail

request.description: Retrieve the audit trail for a specific company by its MongoDB ObjectId.
Retrieve audit trails for all companies with optional filtering by company_id, action, and date range.
Retrieve the audit trail for a specific brand by its MongoDB ObjectId.

item.description: Audit trail endpoints for tracking changes to companies and brands.
